title: Omnisend vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Omnisend and Sendinblue: pricing, features, SMS, automation, and which email marketing platform wins for your business.
h1: Omnisend vs Sendinblue: Complete Feature & Pricing Comparison
intro: Both Omnisend and Sendinblue (now Brevo) offer freemium email marketing with SMS capabilities, but they serve different business needs. This comparison helps you decide which platform is the right fit for your email campaigns, budget, and integration requirements.
choose_a_if: You're an e-commerce brand needing product recommendations and cart abandonment automation
You want push notifications alongside email and SMS marketing
You prefer a platform specifically optimized for online stores with product picker tools
choose_b_if: You need the most generous free tier (100,000 contacts) and 300 free emails daily
You require transactional email capabilities and a built-in CRM
You want multiple communication channels including WhatsApp and live chat support

faq.a: Neither is objectively better—it depends on your needs. Omnisend excels for e-commerce brands with its product picker and omnichannel automation, while Sendinblue wins for transactional email, CRM integration, and free-tier generosity. Compare your specific requirements against each platform's strengths.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Omnisend or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Sendinblue offers better value for budget-conscious users with 100,000 free contacts and 300 daily emails at no cost, versus Omnisend's 250-subscriber free tier. Paid plans start at $16 (Omnisend) vs $25 (Sendinblue), but Sendinblue's free tier can serve many small businesses indefinitely.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Omnisend?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow contact list exports and imports. Most email marketing tools support CSV/standard formats, making migration straightforward. You may need to rebuild automation workflows manually, but your subscriber data transfers easily between platforms.
